title: aster langaoensis
intro: Aster langaoensis, also known as Langao aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the Sichuan province in China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Aster langaoensis is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried and used in capsules or tablets, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
